channel.title: 2026-04-15 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-04-15 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: 机器学习预测磁性材料居里温度：描述符工程、图神经网络与 curated 数据的作用
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该研究围绕机器学习预测磁性材料居里温度展开，系统探讨了描述符工程、图神经网络架构以及高质量 curated 数据集对预测精度的影响。详情需查阅原文。

item.title: Boltzmann Sampling by Diabatic Quantum Annealing
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ju-Yeon Gyhm, Gilhan Kim, Hyukjoon Kwon, Yongjoo Baek
arXiv:2409.18126v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Boltzmann sampling is a central component of many computational frameworks, including numerous algorithms in machine learning. Although quantum annealers have been investigated as potential fast Boltzmann samplers, their dependence on environmental noise makes precise control of the effective temperature difficult, introducing uncertainty into the sampling process. As an alternative, we propose diabatic quantum annealing -- a faster, purely unitary process -- as a controllable Boltzmann sampler in which the effective temperature is determined by the annealing rate. Using the ferromagnetic Ising model and the Sherrington--Kirkpatrick model as test cases, we demonstrate that this method achieves rapid and accurate sampling in the high-temp…

item.title: Agentic LLM Reasoning in a Self-Driving Laboratory for Air-Sensitive Lithium Halide Spinel Conductors
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yuxing Fei, Bernardus Rendy, Xiaochen Yang, Junhee Woo, Xu Huang, Chang Li, Shilong Wang, David Milsted, Yan Zeng, Gerbrand Ceder
arXiv:2604.11957v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Self-driving laboratories promise to accelerate materials discovery. Yet current automated solid-state synthesis platforms are limited to ambient conditions, thereby precluding their use for air-sensitive materials. Here, we present A-Lab for Glovebox Powder Solid-state Synthesis (A-Lab GPSS), a robotic platform capable of synthesizing and characterizing air-sensitive inorganic materials under strict air-free conditions. By integrating an agentic AI framework into the A-Lab GPSS platform, we structure autonomous experimental design through abductive and inductive reasoning. We deploy this platform to explore the vast compositional space of lithium halide spinel solid-state ionic conductors. Across a synthesis campaign comprising 352 samples…

item.title: Classical and Quantum Speedups for Non-Convex Optimization via Energy Conserving Descent
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yihang Sun, Huaijin Wang, Patrick Hayden, Jose Blanchet
arXiv:2604.13022v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The Energy Conserving Descent (ECD) algorithm was recently proposed (De Luca & Silverstein, 2022) as a global non-convex optimization method. Unlike gradient descent, appropriately configured ECD dynamics escape strict local minima and converge to a global minimum, making it appealing for machine learning optimization. We present the first analytical study of ECD, focusing on the one-dimensional setting for this first installment. We formalize a stochastic ECD dynamics (sECD) with energy-preserving noise, as well as a quantum analog of the ECD Hamiltonian (qECD), providing the foundation for a quantum algorithm through Hamiltonian simulation. For positive double-well objectives, we compute the expected hitting time from a local to the glob…

item.title: FastGrasp：面向移动机械臂快速灵巧抓取的学习型全身控制方法
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Heng Tao, Yiming Zhong, Zemin Yang, Yuexin Ma
该工作提出FastGrasp框架，通过条件变分自编码器生成抓取候选位姿，再以强化学习协调移动底盘、机械臂与灵巧手的全身运动，并结合触觉反馈实现高速冲击稳定与实时调整。实验在仿真与真实场景中验证了该方法对多样几何形状物体的快速抓取能力与良好的sim-to-real迁移效果。

item.title: GTCN-G：面向不平衡入侵检测的残差图-时序融合网络
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Tianxiang Xu, Zhichao Wen, Xinyu Zhao, Qi Hu, Yan Li, Chang Liu
该研究提出GTCN-G深度学习框架，用于解决网络入侵检测中的类不平衡与复杂威胁问题。模型融合门控时序卷积网络（G-TCN）提取网络流层次化时序特征，以及图卷积网络（GCN）学习底层图结构，并通过图注意力网络（GAT）实现残差学习机制以保留原始特征信息，从而缓解类不平衡并提升稀有攻击的检测灵敏度。

item.title: Learning Parameterized Nonlinear Elasticity on Curved Surfaces
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yankang Liu, Ke Zhang, Maziar Raissi, Roya Zandi
arXiv:2604.12170v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We learn parameterized nonlinear elasticity on curved surfaces using a physics-informed neural network that enforces governing equations and boundary conditions directly through the loss function, enabling a single trained model to represent a continuous family of elastic equilibria across geometric and material parameters. Nonlinear elasticity on curved manifolds underlies the mechanics of crystalline shells, elastic membranes, and viral capsids, where curvature and topological defects determine equilibrium structure and stability. Traditional exact and finite element solvers rely on symmetry reduction and must be reinitialized for each parameter choice, limiting scalability when symmetry is broken or parameters vary. We validate the propos…

item.title: LIFE：面向前沿系统的能效型高级持续学习智能体AI框架
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Anne Lee, Gurudutt Hosangadi
该研究提出LIFE框架，一种增量、灵活且节能的推理与学习智能体中心系统，用于应对AI驱动高性能计算（HPC）中日益增长的能耗需求与初级持续学习能力的局限。LIFE由编排器、智能体上下文工程、新型记忆系统和信息格点学习四个组件构成，可实现HPC网络管理与运维的自演进。文中以Kubernetes类集群中关键微服务延迟尖峰的检测与缓解为例进行了闭环HPC运维验证。

item.title: Machine learning for four-dimensional SU(3) lattice gauge theories
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Urs Wenger
arXiv:2604.12416v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In this review I summarize how machine learning can be used in lattice gauge theory simulations and what ap-proaches are currently available to improve the sampling of gauge field configurations, with a focus on applications in four-dimensional SU(3) gauge theories. These include approaches based on generative machine-learning models such as (stochastic) normalizing flows and diffusion processes, and an approach based on renormalization group (RG) transformations, more specifically the machine learning of RG-improved gauge actions using gauge-equivariant convolutional neural networks. In particular, I present scaling results for a machine-learned fixed-point action in four-dimensional SU(3) gauge theory towards the continuum limit. The res…

item.title: Training single-electron and single-photon stochastic physical neural networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Tong Dou, Shiro Kumara, Josh Burns, Ethan Sigler, Parth Girdhar, David Petty, Gerard Milburn, Jo Plested, Matt Woolley
arXiv:2604.10861v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The computational demands of deep learning motivate the investigation of alternative approaches to computation. One alternative is physical neural networks~(PNNs), in which learning and inference are performed directly via physical processes. Stochastic PNNs arise when the underlying neurons are realized by the dynamics of a stochastic activation switch. Here we propose novel electronic and photonic stochastic neurons. The electronic realization is implemented by single-electron tunneling through a quantum dot. The photonic realization is implemented via a single-photon source driving one of two modes coupled via a controllable beam-splitter-like interaction. In the electronic case, the charge state of the quantum dot forms the basis for t…

item.title: Training the parametric interactions in an analog bosonic quantum neural network with Fock basis measurement
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Julien Dudas, Baptiste Carles, Elie Gouzien, Julie Grollier, Danijela Marković
arXiv:2411.19112v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Quantum neural networks promise to extend the power of machine learning into the quantum domain, with potential applications ranging from automatic recognition of quantum states to the control of quantum devices. However, their physical implementation and training remain challenging. In particular, the backpropagation algorithm that underpins the efficiency of classical neural networks cannot generally be applied to large quantum systems, as nonlinear quantum dynamics are not efficiently simulable. Instead, variational quantum circuits typically rely on parameter-shift rules or sampling-based gradient estimation. Here we propose a bosonic quantum neural network based on parametrically coupled Gaussian modes. Although the underlying…

item.title: An Active Learning Workflow for Predicting Misfit Volume in Body-Centered Cubic Refractory High-Entropy Alloys
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Shunshun Liu, Prasanna V. Balachandran
Refractory high-entropy alloys (RHEAs) exhibit exceptional high-temperature mechanical properties. However, a mechanistic understanding of their yield strength requires accurate determination of the misfit volume descriptor (δ), which quantifies the local volume change due to the size and electronic heterogeneity of constituent elements in the solid solution. Traditional approximations, such as Vegard's Law, fail to capture local atomic relaxation and electronic structure effects in these compositionally complex systems. An active learning workflow is developed that integrates density functional theory calculations with ensemble machine learning (ML) to efficiently predict the δ-descriptor across 126 equiatomic quinary BCC RHEAs. Partial dependence plots and symbolic regression reveal tha…

item.title: XANE(3): An E(3)-Equivariant Graph Neural Network for Accurate Prediction of XANES Spectra from Atomic Structures
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Vitor F. Grizzi, Luke N. Pretzie, Jiayi Xu, Cong Liu
arXiv:2604.12140v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present XANE(3), a physics-based E(3)-equivariant graph neural network for predicting X-ray absorption near-edge structure (XANES) spectra directly from atomic structures. The model combines tensor-product message passing with spherical harmonic edge features, absorber-query attention pooling, custom equivariant layer normalization, adaptive gated residual connections, and a spectral readout based on a multi-scale Gaussian basis with an optional sigmoidal background term. To improve line-shape fidelity, training is performed with a composite objective that includes pointwise spectral reconstruction together with first- and second-derivative matching terms. We evaluate the model on a dataset of 5,941 FDMNES simulations of iron oxide surf…

item.title: Hopfield框架下基于材料性质场的深度神经网络
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yanxiao Hu, Ye Sheng, Caichao Ye, Wenxing Qian, Xiaoxin Xu, Yabei Wu, Jiong Yang, William A. Goddard III, Wenqing Zhang
该工作将材料性质场(MPF)与Hopfield网络架构相结合，提出了具有显式解析结构的深度神经网络框架mPFDNN。MPF以成对相互作用为基础将材料物理性质表示为解析场，并严格满足基本对称性；通过将非线性原子间相互作用重构为"隐藏神经元"，构建了一个可解析处理的深度网络，以逐步捕捉更复杂的相互作用图景。

item.title: 基于深度学习的各向异性介质脆性断裂相场建模
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 N. Plungė, P. Brommer, R. S. Edwards, E. G. Kakouris
该工作提出一种变分物理信息深度学习框架，首次在深度Ritz方法中引入高阶各向异性相场模型族，通过广义裂纹密度泛函描述各向异性介质中的脆性裂纹扩展。方法采用高阶B样条基函数 enriched 试函数空间以准确稳定地表示高阶梯度，避免传统自动微分；数值算例展示了各向异性情形下方向相关的裂纹生长行为。

item.title: EMBER：混合LLM架构中学习得到的脉冲神经网络动力学驱动的自主认知行为
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 William Savage
该研究提出EMBER混合认知架构，将大语言模型（LLM）置于受生物学启发的持久联想基质中作为可替换推理引擎。核心为具有22万神经元、STDP可塑性、四层层级组织及奖励调制学习的脉冲神经网络（SNN）。通过新颖的z-score标准化top-k群体编码将文本嵌入映射到SNN，实现跨嵌入维度的82.2%辨别保持率。SNN在空闲期间通过STDP侧向传播自主触发并塑造LLM行为，无需外部提示或脚本触发。

item.title: 机器学习用于电极材料：基于成分的性质预测
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Hao Wu, Cameron Hargreaves, Arpit Mishra, Gian-Marco Rignanese
该工作基于Materials Project Battery Explorer数据集，对MODNet、CrabNet和基于Magpie特征的随机森林三种机器学习框架在电池电极材料性质预测方面进行了基准测试。CrabNet在所有测试中表现最优，研究通过自举重采样和两种交叉验证策略验证了结果的稳健性，并展示了无监督聚类揭示材料分组的能力。

item.title: 硬件非线性下基于脑启发表征的鲁棒推理与学习
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 William Youngwoo Chung, Hamza Errahmouni Barkam, Tamoghno Das, Mohsen Imani
该工作针对存内计算（CIM）架构引入的非线性失真与可靠性问题，提出基于超维计算（HDC）的硬件感知优化框架。通过将编码建模为最小化理想核与硬件约束核之间Frobenius范数的优化问题，并联合优化超向量表示，该方法在严重硬件扰动下将QuantHD的准确率提升至84%，较原始方法提高48%。该框架对依赖精确变量绑定的图结构HDC推理同样关键。

item.title: Teaching Artificial Intelligence to Perform Rapid, Resolution-Invariant Grain Growth Modeling via Fourier Neural Operator
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Iman Peivaste, Ahmed Makradi, Salim Belouettar
arXiv:2503.14568v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Microstructural evolution, particularly grain growth, plays a critical role in shaping the physical, optical, and electronic properties of materials. Traditional phase-field modeling accurately simulates these phenomena but is computationally intensive, especially for large systems and fine spatial resolutions. While machine learning approaches have been employed to accelerate simulations, they often struggle with resolution dependence and generalization across different grain scales. This study introduces a novel approach utilizing Fourier Neural Operator (FNO) to achieve resolution-invariant modeling of microstructure evolution in multi-grain systems. FNO operates in the Fourier space and can inherently handle varying resolutions by lear…

item.title: Thermodynamic Liquid Manifold Networks: Physics-Bounded Deep Learning for Solar Forecasting in Autonomous Off-Grid Microgrids
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Mohammed Ezzaldin Babiker Abdullah
arXiv:2604.11909v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The stable operation of autonomous off-grid photovoltaic systems requires solar forecasting algorithms that respect atmospheric thermodynamics. Contemporary deep learning models consistently exhibit critical anomalies, primarily severe temporal phase lags during cloud transients and physically impossible nocturnal power generation. To resolve this divergence between data-driven modeling and deterministic celestial mechanics, this research introduces the Thermodynamic Liquid Manifold Network. The methodology projects 22 meteorological and geometric variables into a Koopman-linearized Riemannian manifold to systematically map complex climatic dynamics. The architecture integrates a Spectral Calibration unit and a multiplicative Thermodynamic A…

item.title: Physics-Informed Neural Network Framework for Phase-Field Modeling of Intergranular Fracture
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 P G Kubendran Amos
Intergranular fracture, characterised by the preferential growth of crack along the grain boundaries is a critical failure mode in polycrystalline materials. While phase-field models have been widely used to simulate such fracture within finite-element frameworks, their combination with physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) for microstructure-dependent crack growth remains largely unexplored. This work develops a PINN-based phase-field formulation to model intergranular fracture. Introducing a reduced resistance to an interface, by representing the grain boundary through a spatially varying fracture toughness field, the fracture problem is solved, in the present work, using a staggered two-network architecture. While one network handles the displacement field, the other solves the phas…

item.title: 蒙特卡洛随机深度：深度学习不确定性估计方法
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Adam T. Müller, Tobias Rögelein, Nicolaj C. Stache
该工作将随机深度（Stochastic Depth, SD）正则化重新用于不确定性量化，建立蒙特卡洛随机深度（MCSD）与近似变分推断的理论联系。在COCO和COCO-O数据集上，MCSD与YOLO、RT-DETR等先进检测器进行了首个全面的多任务实证基准对比，结果表明MCSD在预测精度和计算效率方面与蒙特卡洛Dropout及MC-DropBlock相比具有竞争力。

item.title: Classification and correlation signatures of chiral spin liquids on the pyrochlore lattice
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Chunxiao Liu, Leon Balents, Yasir Iqbal
arXiv:2604.11880v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present a systematic classification and variational study of chiral quantum spin liquids on the pyrochlore lattice based on fermionic parton constructions. Focusing on chiral U(1) and Z₂ spin-liquid Ansätze, we characterize their symmetry properties, flux structures, and low-energy spinon spectra within a projective symmetry group framework, and incorporate gauge fluctuations through Gutzwiller-projected wave functions studied by variational Monte Carlo. From the equal-time spin structure factor, we develop correlation-based diagnostics that distinguish gauge-dominated Coulomb phases from states with substantial matter-field and short-range contributions. Distinct chiral flux sectors, though close in energy, exhibit markedly different deg…

item.title: 一种与CMOS兼容、可扩展且紧凑的磁电自旋扭矩微波探测器
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Shuhui Liu, Riccardo Tomasello, Bin Fang, Aitian Chen, Like Zhang, Zhenhao Liu, Rui Hu, Wenkui Lin, Mario Carpentieri, Baoshun Zhang, Xixiang Zhang, Giovanni Finocchio, Zhongming Zeng
该工作展示了一种单片集成磁电（ME）天线与磁隧道结（MTJ）的磁电自旋扭矩微波探测器。该器件无需外置天线，可直接将无线电磁信号转换为直流输出，在亚微瓦功率水平下实现超过90 kV/W的灵敏度、3 pW·Hz⁻⁰·⁵的等效噪声功率，且面积仅0.4 mm²。其高性能源于入射电磁波驱动ME天线产生的微波电压与应变，与MTJ中直流电流驱动的非相干磁化动力学之间的非线性耦合。该器件与互补金属氧化物半导体（CMOS）工艺兼容，具有可扩展性。

item.title: 量子 scrambling 的周期轨道迹公式：正常双曲不变流形的作用
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Stephen Wiggins
该研究为具有指数-1鞍点体系的局域微正则OTOC推导了领先阶半经典展开，将 scrambling 速率表示为正常双曲不变流形（NHIM）上不稳定周期轨道的相干叠加。推导利用了过渡态的正则形式理论，将鞍点附近的哈密顿量转化为依赖于守恒作用量的可积形式，并概述了微正则迹、可积体系半经典传播子、稳定性矩阵因式分解以及稳相近似中Schur补约化的推导过程。

item.title: 量子力学百年之后：迈向建构性的以观测为中心的视角
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Timothy Stroschein, Markus Reiher
该工作提出需要一种严格的建构性数学纲领来识别有效描述中的本质自由度，倡导以信号为主要分析对象的观测中心视角，将波函数和哈密顿量重建为合理化观测数据的辅助结构。研究从基于信号的谱方程出发，将其与椭球傅里叶理论、有限观测时间谱分析以及短时量子模拟结果相联系，并强调了实现准确分辨率所需的必要观测时间与信号有效谱密度之间的尖锐精度跃迁。

item.title: 交错磁体Cr₂SO中的全光学超快纯自旋流
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Deepika Gill, Ruikai Wu, Peter Elliott, Sangeeta Sharma, Sam Shallcross
该研究表明，在二维d波交错磁体Cr₂SO中，红外谷激发与THz脉冲包络的结合可产生大且接近100%的纯自旋流。其机制依赖于线偏振光通过谷选择规则与自旋相反谷的耦合，以及共存THz脉冲赋予谷自旋激发的固有动量位移。该方法为在具有极低本征自旋-轨道耦合的d波二维交错磁体中全光学产生纯自旋流提供了实用途径，开辟了在低自旋混合环境中光波调控自旋的新方向。

item.title: 三维手性超导体中的电荷-4e/6e超导电性与手性金属
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Chu-Tian Gao, Chen Lu, Yu-Bo Liu, Zhiming Pan, Fan Yang
该工作研究由立方Oₕ点群支配的三维体系中手性超导电性的热涨落遗迹相。通过金兹堡-朗道分析构建低能有效哈密顿量并进行蒙特卡洛模拟，系统研究了E_g和T₂g/T₁ᵤ不可约表示下手性序的相位涨落。与二维体系不同，三维中的多相交汇表现为四临界点而非三重临界点。研究发现，在特定参数区，主要手性序可熔化进入手性金属相；对于E_g表示，相位涨落在某些区域还可诱导电荷-4e超导电性。

item.title: 电路量子静磁学中的手性电子-磁通子超导
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Adel Ali, Alexey Belyanin
该工作研究了由LC谐振器电感产生的量子化磁通真空涨落所介导的二维电子系统中的电子配对机制。该相互作用在角动量态之间诱导长程吸引相互作用，可在广泛材料中实现临界温度为数开尔文甚至更高的配对。所诱导的态为配对密度波拓扑手性超导体。该电路QED平台为调控二维电子相互作用、构筑新奇量子物相提供了可调谐的有前景工具。

item.title: 结合微扰敏感自然旋量与Cholesky分解处理双电子积分的相对论耦合簇线性响应理论的高效实现
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Sudipta Chakraborty, Muskan Begom, Xubo Wang, Achintya Kumar Dutta
该研究提出了一种高效的线性响应耦合簇单双激发（LR-CCSD）方法实现，用于计算具有显著相对论和电子相关效应体系的静态与频率依赖极化率。方法采用基于X2C的哈密顿量（X2CAMF和X2CMP），引入Cholesky分解降低内存需求，并通过即时生成昂贵的外部指标积分避免存储。基准测试表明X2CMP哈密顿量对大基组体系表现更一致，FNS++CD-X2CMP-LR-CCSD方法与四分量参考值高度吻合，平均可缩减约73%的虚旋量空间。

item.title: El Agente Quntur: A research collaborator agent for quantum chemistry
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Juan B. Pérez-Sánchez, Yunheng Zou, Jorge A. Campos-Gonzalez-Angulo, Marcel Müller, Ignacio Gustin, Andrew Wang, Han Hao, Tsz Wai Ko, Changhyeok Choi, Eric S. Isbrandt, Mohammad Ghazi Vakili, Hanyong Xu, Chris Crebolder, Varinia Bernales, Alán Aspuru-Guzik
arXiv:2602.04850v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Quantum chemistry is a foundational enabling tool for the fields of chemistry, materials science, computational biology and others. Despite of its power, the practical application of quantum chemistry simulations remains in the hands of qualified experts due to methodological complexity, software heterogeneity, and the need for informed interpretation of results. To bridge the accessibility gap for these tools and expand their reach to chemists with broader backgrounds, we introduce El Agente Quntur, a hierarchical, multi-agent AI system designed to operate not merely as an automation tool but as a research collaborator for computational quantum chemistry. Quntur was designed following three main strategies: i) elimination of hard-coded…

item.title: 通过多参数控制增强猝冷量子奥托循环性能
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Raymon S. Watson, Karen V. Kheruntsyan
该研究利用猝冷近似研究多参数同时可控的量子热力学奥托循环，方法普遍适用于具有此类调控能力的多体系统。作者在一维玻色气体和横场伊辛模型中验证了该多参数猝冷协议。发现作为引擎运行时，这种多参数奥托循环不仅在净功和效率上优于其组成的单参数奥托循环，而且优于各单参数循环独立运行时的净功之和。

item.title: Epigenetic feedback reshapes dynamical landscapes in gene regulatory networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Sascha H. Hauck, Sandip Saha, Narsis A. Kiani, Jesper N. Tegner
arXiv:2512.24427v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Understanding how gene regulatory networks (GRNs) give rise to stable and dynamic cellular states remains a central challenge in theoretical biology, particularly when slow epigenetic feedback reshapes the underlying regulatory landscape. While experimental approaches such as single-cell transcriptomics reveal rich dynamical behaviour, a tractable theoretical framework that links gene expression, epigenetic control, and collective dynamics remains challenging. Here, we develop an extended Dynamical Mean Field Theory (DMFT) framework for GRNs that incorporates epigenetic modifications as slow, feedback-driven variables. Building on the analogy between Hopfield networks and spin glass systems, we derive effective stochastic equations…

item.title: 从悬臂梁到薄膜：磁共振力显微镜的先进扫描协议
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Nils Prumbaum, Christian L. Degen, Alexander Eichler
该工作基于数值模拟评估了应变SiN谐振器作为磁共振力显微镜（MRFM）力传感器的性能，指出其面外振荡方向可提升样品重建质量。作者进一步提出一种多切片压缩感知扫描协议，可在给定测量时间内最大化获取的信息量；模拟预测新协议与优化算法相结合可将总采集时间缩短多达两个数量级，同时保持重建保真度。

item.title: screw-pinch磁场中的导心动力学
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Alain J. Brizard
该工作研究了具有双重对称性的screw-pinch磁场中带电粒子的导心动力学，验证了Kruskal径向作用量的绝热不变级数展开与磁矩回转作用的一阶微扰展开的一致性。由于径向作用量是完整轨道动力学的精确不变量，磁矩可表示为非微扰的积分形式，从而可用于检验导心近似的有效性。

item.title: 高磁场下介观电子浴的加热动力学
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 F. Zanichelli, A. Veillon, C. Piquard, A. Aassime, Y. Sato, A. Cavanna, Y. Jin, J. Folk, U. Gennser, A. Anthore, F. Pierre
该工作利用噪声测温技术，设计并研究了一个介观热电路，其中电子、声子和核自旋系统之间的热流可在较慢时间尺度上发生。器件核心是一个微米尺度金属岛，通过两到四条弹道量子霍尔通道与大型冷电子库相连。研究发现了一个介观尺度特有的两步热化过程：快速的初始温度跃升后，伴随一个持续数分钟的缓慢升温。该现象可通过电子量子通道热流、冷声子热流及金属岛内核自旋热流之间的平衡得到定量解释。

item.title: 强4d-4f关联多铁材料Ba₃RRu₂O₉ (R=Ho, Gd, Tb, Nd) 中的奇异磁热效应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Mohit Kumar, Sayan Ghosh, Gourab Roy, Ekta Kushwaha, Vincent Caignaert, Wilfrid Prellier, Subham Majumdar, Vincent Hardy, Tathamay Basu
该工作报道了具有4d-4f电子关联的Ba₃RRu₂O₉系列化合物的磁热效应(MCE)。重稀土成员(Ho, Gd, Tb)在低温和磁相变附近表现出显著的MCE，并呈现从常规到非常规MCE的转变行为。轻稀土成员Ba₃NdRu₂O₉则在24 K以下出现铁磁有序并显示正MCE，这些现象归因于温度依赖的复杂自旋重取向和各向异性。

item.title: 通过磁性赛道结构的约瑟夫森耦合
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 A. A. Mazanik, F. S. Bergeret
该研究探讨了两个超导电极通过 hosting Bloch型畴壁（DW）的铁磁赛道连接时的约瑟夫森耦合。作者发现超导电性与畴壁的相互作用导致超电流呈现高度非平庸的空间分布，包括电流环的形成，并对畴壁的位置和取向高度敏感。进一步研究表明，约瑟夫森临界电流I_c可通过调控畴壁在赛道上的位置实现高效调控，表现出显著变化和可调的0–π转变。这些结果为超导赛道器件的设计提供了明确原则，并确立了畴壁作为赛道存储架构中读出控制单元的可行性。

item.title: Ce₂PtGe₆中共线反铁磁诱导的大自发霍尔效应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Hayata Matsuda, Ruo Hibino, Chihiro Tabata, Koji Kaneko, Nonoka Higa, Takahiro Onimaru, Hiroto Tanaka, Hideki Tou, Hitoshi Sugawara, Junichi Hayashi, Keiki Takeda, Hisashi Kotegawa
该工作报告了反铁磁体系Ce₂PtGe₆中出现显著自发霍尔效应（零场反常霍尔效应）。单晶中子散射实验证实其具有传播矢量q=0的共线反铁磁结构，净磁化强度仅约10⁻³ μ_B/Ce，表明观测到的反常霍尔电导率（AHC）源于反铁磁结构本身的对称性破缺。AHC高达300 Ω⁻¹cm⁻¹，超过相关化合物Ce₂CuGe₆和Ce₂PdGe₆的内禀值，这主要归因于Pt原子的大自旋-轨道耦合，为理解贝里曲率与局域f磁矩在反铁磁构型下的相互作用提供了平台。

item.title: 磁振子光-物质耦合形式体系：以光探测量子几何
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ying Shing Liu (Institute for Theoretical Solid State Physics, RWTH Aachen University, Aachen, Germany), Emil Viñas Boström (Max Planck Institute for the Structure and Dynamics of Matter, Center for Free Electron Laser Science, Hamburg, Germany), Michael A. Sentef (Institute for Theoretical Physics and Bremen Center for Computational Materials Science, University of Bremen, Bremen, Germany, Max Planck Institute for the Structure and Dynamics of Matter, Center for Free Electron Laser Science, Hamburg, Germany), Silvia Viola Kusminskiy (Institute for Theoretical Solid State Physics, RWTH Aachen University, Aachen, Germany, Max Planck Institute for the Science of Light, Erlangen, Germany)
该研究建立了磁振子光-物质耦合的有效形式体系，证明在广泛条件下Fleury-Loudon拉曼顶点可直接从磁振子有效哈密顿量的光-物质耦合展开中获得，从而绕开基于虚电子过程的常规微观推导。由此解析地建立了拉曼圆二色性与磁振子能带贝里曲率之间的联系，并在单层CrI₃中预言了有限温度下拓扑磁振子在拉曼圆二色性中的特征信号，为磁振子系统中量子几何敏感的光学探测提供了通用途径。

item.title: 磁可调手性声子极化激元与磁光连续域束缚态
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yu Sun, Jue Li, Wei Li, Bo Li, Qinghua Song, Mengyao Li
该研究提出了一种混合平台，将六方氮化硼（hBN）声子极化激元与磁光光子晶体支持的手性连续域束缚态耦合，实现了强且选择性的光子耦合。该耦合导致显著的能级劈裂和杂化态形成，其模态组成可通过磁光响应进行磁调控。此外，杂化态在圆偏振激发下表现出手性选择吸收，为磁可调手性声子极化激元器件提供了可行路径。

item.title: 非简并泵浦超导谐振参量放大器及其相敏放大证据
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Songyuan Zhao, Stafford Withington, Christopher Thomas
该工作提出并实现了一种基于非简并泵浦的超导谐振参量放大器工作方案，解决了增益带内不连续和泵浦 tone 滤除两大设计难题。实验采用 NbN 薄膜半波谐振放大器，测得峰值增益 26 dB、3-dB 带宽 0.5 MHz，且非简并泵浦在增益漂移稳定性上较简并泵浦提升约 4 倍。该方案在 ~4 K 环境下可靠放大，并适用于跨谐波放大。

item.title: 双共线反铁磁体中反常霍尔效应的非单调标度行为
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ruifeng Wang, Chi Fang, Ilya Kostanovski, Ke Xiao, Felix Küster, Jenny Davern, Naoto Nagaosa, Stuart S. P. Parkin
该研究对分子束外延生长的FeTe薄膜中的反常霍尔效应（AHE）进行了系统研究。FeTe是一种具有完全磁补偿双共线反铁磁结构的二维范德华材料，并表现出显著的Kondo相互作用。实验发现，在奈尔温度（T_N ~ 60 K）以下出现大的反常霍尔电导率，且在约49 K的窄温区高场下AHE呈现非线性，偏离了常规AHE与纵向电导率的标度关系。线性拟合显示截距出现显著负峰，伴随场诱导倾斜磁矩。该AHE响应与FeTe拓扑能带结构产生的贝里曲率相关，揭示了拓扑、磁性与电子输运之间的复杂相互作用。

item.title: Observation of feedback-directed quantum dynamics in large-scale quantum processors
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ruizhe Shen, Ching Hua Lee
arXiv:2604.11900v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Programmable quantum hardware provides an emerging platform for exploring and controlling non-unitary quantum dynamics through measurement-based operations. In this work, we introduce feedback-directed circuit architectures that integrate spatially structured mid-circuit measurements with real-time conditional operations to steer the evolution of random dynamics, and perform their large-scale simulations (up to 100 qubits) on programmable digital quantum processors. By promoting measurement from a passive readout to an active control signal, these adaptive monitored circuits enable directional information flow and generate intrinsic asymmetry in random circuit simulations. We implement this framework on IBM superconducting quantum processo…

item.title: 反铁磁态的非易失性压磁开关
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Xilai Bao, Oleksandr Pylypovskyi, Huali Yang, Yali Xie, Damien Faurie, Fatih Zighem, Sophie Weber, Jiabin Wang, Jiachen Liang, Hong Xu, Ruoan Zou, Huatao Jiang, Dong Han, Pavlo Makushko, Xiaotao Wang, Lin Guo, Proloy T. Das, Nicola Spaldin, Denys Makarov, Run-Wei Li
该研究提出了一种基于三角Mn3Ir存储单元的压磁写入方案，通过交换偏置效应实现读出。该方法能够确定性和非易失地切换反铁磁态，且对外部扰动具有极强的鲁棒性。开关机制归因于Mn3Ir的压磁效应与反铁磁-铁磁界面处Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用的协同作用，克服了传统基于等温结晶机制的等温方法的速度限制。该工作凸显了压磁效应在设计先进自旋电子学器件及开发高能效存储技术中的潜力。

item.title: 自旋-1双线性-双二次链中自旋子相互作用的探测
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yonatan Lin, Oleg A. Starykh, Anna Keselman
该工作研究具有退禁闭自旋子的临界相中自旋-1双线性-双二次链的动力学自旋与向列关联。研究表明，在磁场或单离子各向异性存在下，可直接探测自旋子相互作用。解析预测得到了微观模型的矩阵乘积态数值模拟支持。

item.title: Projector, Neural, and Tensor-Network Representations of Z_N Cluster and Dipolar-cluster SPT States
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Seungho Lee, Daesik Kim, Hyun-Yong Lee, Jung Hoon Han
arXiv:2604.06741v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The Z_N cluster-state wavefunction, a paradigmatic example of symmetry-protected topological (SPT) order with Z_N × Z_N symmetry, is expressed in various equivalent ways. We identify the projector-based scheme called the P-representation as the efficient way to express cluster and dipolar cluster state's wavefunctions. Employing the restricted Boltzmann machine scheme to re-write the interaction matrix in the P-representation in terms of neural weight matrices allows us to develop the neural quantum state (NQS) and the matrix product state (MPS) representations of the same state. The NQS and MPS representations differ only in the way the weight matrices are split and grouped together in a matrix product. For both Z_N cluster and dipolar…

item.title: Qhronology: A Python package for studying quantum models of closed timelike curves
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Lachlan G. Bishop
arXiv:2601.17459v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Qhronology is a novel scientific-computing package for studying quantum models of closed timelike curves (CTCs) and simulating general quantum information processing and computation. Written in Python, the program provides a comprehensive framework for analyzing quantum theories of antichronological time travel, including functionality to calculate quantum resolutions to temporal paradoxes. It also operates as a complete quantum circuit simulator, enabling the examination of quantum algorithms and protocols in both numerical and symbolic capacities. In this paper, we formally introduce Qhronology, beginning with discussion on aspects of its design philosophy and architecture. An overview of its basic usage is then presented, along…

item.title: 周期势中的量子临界理论：奇异金属热电与磁输运
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Eric Nilsson, Koenraad Schalm
该工作研究了二维量子临界理论在强平移对称性破缺（由零平均化学势晶格引起）下的直流/交流热电与磁输运性质。通过近极端 AdS 黑洞的全息建模，发现这些系统表现出更好的导电性、类 Drude 的热输运（但非真正的 Drude）以及大磁场下近似 B-线性的纵向磁电阻。这些特征可能更广泛地适用于晶格势方差远大于平均值或强平移对称性破缺的情形。

item.title: Study of Free‐Space Optical Quantum Network: Review and Prospectives
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Science: Table of Contents
👤 Hua‐Ying Liu, Zhenda Xie, Shining Zhu
Advanced Science, EarlyView.

item.title: Iterative learning scheme for crystal structure prediction with anharmonic lattice dynamics
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Hao Gao, Yue-Wen Fang, and Ion Errea
Author(s): Hao Gao, Yue-Wen Fang, and Ion Errea First-principles based crystal structure prediction (CSP) methods have proved to be an essential tool for the discovery of new materials. However, in solids close to displacive phase transitions, which are common in ferroelectrics, thermoelectrics, charge-density wave systems, or superconducting hyd… [Phys. Rev. B 113, 134113] Published Wed Apr 15, 2026

item.title: 二三维张量网络重整化群中的晶格反射对称性与纠缠过滤
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Xinliang Lyu and Naoki Kawashima
该工作在张量网络重整化群（TNRG）框架下引入晶格反射对称性与纠缠过滤技术，以提升算法效率并改善临界行为计算精度。该方法适用于经典与量子格点体系的高维临界性研究。

item.title: 二苯并氮杂䓬桥联网状聚合酞菁作为可降解多相光催化剂
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Erem Ahmetali, Azra Kocaarslan, Vanessa Trouillet, Stefan Heißler, Stefan Bräse
该工作围绕二苯并氮杂䓬桥联的网状聚合酞菁材料展开，旨在开发可降解的多相光催化剂。具体合成策略、催化性能及降解机制等详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 氢键网络调控CSH/SiO₂界面粘附与力学响应：ReaxFF分子动力学研究
item.description:
📚 ScienceDirect
该工作采用ReaxFF分子动力学方法，研究水化硅酸钙（CSH）与SiO₂界面处的氢键网络对其界面粘附行为及力学响应的调控机制。详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 可降解二苯并氮杂䓬桥联网络聚合物酞菁作为多相光催化剂（外封面）
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Erem Ahmetali, Azra Kocaarslan, Vanessa Trouillet, Stefan Heißler, Stefan Bräse
该研究开发了基于二苯并氮杂䓬桥联的网络聚合物酞菁材料，兼具可降解性与多相光催化活性，具体应用与降解机制需查阅原文。

item.title: Beyond Weather Correlation: A Comparative Study of Static and Temporal Neural Architectures for Fine-Grained Residential Energy Consumption Forecasting in Melbourne, Australia
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Prasad Nimantha Madusanka Ukwatta Hewage, Hao Wu
arXiv:2604.12304v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Accurate short-term residential energy consumption forecasting at sub-hourly resolution is critical for smart grid management, demand response programmes, and renewable energy integration. While weather variables are widely acknowledged as key drivers of residential electricity demand, the relative merit of incorporating temporal autocorrelation - the sequential memory of past consumption; over static meteorological features alone remains underexplored at fine-grained (5-minute) temporal resolution for Australian households. This paper presents a rigorous empirical comparison of a Multilayer Perceptron (MLP) and a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) recurrent network applied to two real-world Melbourne households: House 3 (a standard grid-connecte…

item.title: 稳态平衡与非平衡噪声网络动力学
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Pik-Yin Lai
该工作从理论上研究了噪声网络围绕其稳定无噪声稳态的涨落动力学。研究根据网络连接性质、对称性及噪声协方差矩阵识别了多种非平衡动力学成因，并推导了网络处于平衡态的若干等价条件。特别地，通过稳态概率流和相对于有效势面的漂移速度分析了非平衡稳态（NESS）动力学；将过阻尼布朗运动视为一般噪声有向网络在NESS中的特例，并导出了适用于一般非平衡噪声网络动力学的广义涨落-耗散关系，结果经数值模拟验证。

item.title: 脑机接口揭示广泛使用的神经信号起源
item.description:
📚 Nature
该工作利用脑机接口实验揭示了大脑皮层高频伽马（high gamma）活动的起源。研究表明该活动主要由同步化的神经元输入产生，而非输出，这一发现对神经科学研究中广泛采用high gamma信号的解释具有重要影响。

item.title: High‐Throughput Data Generation and Transfer Learning Enabled Microstructure‐Property Integrated Design of Nickel‐Based Powder Metallurgy Superalloy
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Science: Table of Contents
👤 Zixin Li, Hongtao Zhang, Zichao Peng, Yuheng Zhang, Qian Lv, Yihuan Cao, Xuqing Wang, Huadong Fu, Jianxin Xie
Advanced Science, EarlyView.

item.title: Printed MoS 2 memristive nanosheet networks for spiking neurons with multi-order complexity
item.description:
📚 Nature Nanotechnology
👤 Shreyash S. Hadke, Carol N. Klingler, Spencer T. Brown, Meghana Holla, Xudong Zhuang, Linda Li 等14位作者
Nature Nanotechnology, Published online: 15 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41565-026-02149-6 Printed MoS2 memristive networks yield spiking neurons with multi-order complexity. Thermally activated snap-back produces physiological waveforms that stimulate mouse Purkinje neurons, offering a scalable platform for bio-realistic neuromorphic hardware and brain–machine interfaces.
